RingCentral just made the SMB price objection everyone's been dreading — and handed us a TCO story in the same breath. Meanwhile 8x8 spent Tuesday explaining an outage to Reddit.

## ⚡ Signals

- 💼 **Sales:** RingCentral raised SMB per-seat pricing ~8% effective September → lead renewals and competitive deals with the TCO comparison, especially where compliance recording is bolted on at extra cost. [UC Today](https://www.uctoday.com/unified-communications/ringcentral-smb-price-rise-2026/)
- 🛠️ **Product:** Dialpad shipped AI call summaries with automatic recording disclosure baked in → worth a teardown before our own disclosure work is scoped. [Dialpad blog](https://www.dialpad.com/blog/ai-recording-disclosure/)
- 👔 **Leadership:** 8x8's four-hour US-East voice outage is their second this quarter → reliability is becoming a credible differentiation axis in mid-market deals. [The Register](https://www.theregister.com/2026/07/21/8x8_voice_outage/)

## 🆕 New this week

- **RingCentral SMB price rise** — ~8% on Core and Advanced tiers from September, compliance add-ons unchanged. [UC Today](https://www.uctoday.com/unified-communications/ringcentral-smb-price-rise-2026/)
- **8x8 US-East voice outage** — four hours of degraded calling Tuesday, second incident this quarter. [The Register](https://www.theregister.com/2026/07/21/8x8_voice_outage/)
- **Dialpad AI summaries with disclosure** — recording disclosure automated inside the AI summary flow. [Dialpad blog](https://www.dialpad.com/blog/ai-recording-disclosure/)
- **Theta Lake expands Zoom Phone coverage** — new capture integrations announced at their partner day. [Theta Lake](https://thetalake.com/press/partner-day-2026-zoom-phone/)
- **GoTo Connect admin complaints resurface** — a well-upvoted r/sysadmin thread on billing and admin UX friction. [r/sysadmin](https://www.reddit.com/r/sysadmin/comments/goto_connect_billing/)

## Details

**RingCentral raises SMB pricing.** RingCentral notified customers that Core and Advanced tiers rise roughly 8% for SMB accounts at September renewals, with compliance recording still priced as an add-on on top ([UC Today](https://www.uctoday.com/unified-communications/ringcentral-smb-price-rise-2026/)). Community reaction has centred on the add-on stacking rather than the headline rise itself. _Why it matters — **Sales:** renewal-window prospects now have a concrete number to beat; our bundled recording story lands hardest here._

**8x8 US-East voice outage.** 8x8 confirmed a four-hour degradation of inbound and outbound calling across US-East on Tuesday, attributed to a failed routing update; status page updates lagged the Reddit thread by nearly an hour ([The Register](https://www.theregister.com/2026/07/21/8x8_voice_outage/)). It's their second voice incident this quarter. _Why it matters — **Leadership:** two incidents in a quarter makes reliability a fair, factual talking point rather than FUD._

**Dialpad ships AI summaries with automatic disclosure.** Dialpad's new AI call summaries include jurisdiction-aware recording disclosure played automatically at call start, positioned squarely at regulated buyers ([Dialpad blog](https://www.dialpad.com/blog/ai-recording-disclosure/)). Coverage so far is US two-party-consent states only. _Why it matters — **Product:** overlaps our disclosure roadmap; the US-only scope is the gap to note._

**Theta Lake expands Zoom Phone capture.** Theta Lake announced expanded capture integrations for Zoom Phone at its partner day, including screen-share archiving ([Theta Lake](https://thetalake.com/press/partner-day-2026-zoom-phone/)). Nothing announced touches our integration surface.

**GoTo Connect admin friction thread.** A r/sysadmin thread (400+ upvotes) aggregates complaints about GoTo Connect billing changes and admin console regressions ([r/sysadmin](https://www.reddit.com/r/sysadmin/comments/goto_connect_billing/)). Sentiment is grumbling rather than churning, but several commenters name alternatives.

## 🔁 Continuing stories

- **RingCentral RingSense expansion** — now GA in EMEA; last week it was US-only preview. [RingCentral](https://www.ringcentral.com/whatsnew/ringsense-emea.html)

## 🏢 Competitor sections

### RingCentral

Price rise covered above; separately, RingSense AI moved to EMEA GA ([RingCentral](https://www.ringcentral.com/whatsnew/ringsense-emea.html)). No complaint-volume change week over week.

### 8x8

Outage covered above. Their status-page communication gap is drawing more criticism than the incident itself ([The Register](https://www.theregister.com/2026/07/21/8x8_voice_outage/)).

### Dialpad

AI disclosure launch covered above; marketing is leaning hard on "compliance built in" language aimed at finance buyers ([Dialpad blog](https://www.dialpad.com/blog/ai-recording-disclosure/)).

### Theta Lake

Partner-day announcements expand their Zoom Phone capture footprint ([Theta Lake](https://thetalake.com/press/partner-day-2026-zoom-phone/)). **Where we fit:** their capture roadmap still has no native Spoke integration — the partnership conversation stays open, and joint finance-vertical deals remain the wedge.

## 📚 Worth a read

- [Gartner: Midmarket UCaaS buying criteria 2026](https://www.gartner.com/en/documents/midmarket-ucaas-2026) — reliability and bundled compliance jumped two places in stated criteria.
- [No Jitter: The quiet consolidation of compliance recording](https://www.nojitter.com/compliance-recording-consolidation) — good map of who owns what after two years of acquisitions.
